nasb.text: Will I not on that day,” declares the Lord, “Destroy wise men from Edom And understanding from the mountain of Esau?

esv.text: Will I not on that day, declares the Lord, destroy the wise men out of Edom, and understanding out of Mount Esau?

cnv.text: 耶和華宣告說：到那日， 我豈不從以東滅絕智慧人嗎？ 豈不從以掃山除掉聰明人嗎？

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“到那天， 我要毁灭以东的智者， 除掉以扫山上的明哲。
